'''Shinda''' was an [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who governed the [[Spirva sector/Legends|Spirva sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He banned the 50th annual publication of ''[[Galladinium's Galactic Datalog of Fantastic Technology]]'' for safety concerns during his tenure.
